lic.claimsTitle: At claim time, you are not alone
lic.claimsText: When a family loses someone, paperwork is the last thing they can handle. Dilipsingh bhai personally walks with the family through the entire LIC claim — forms, certificates, follow-ups — until the money reaches the nominee's account. This is the promise behind every policy he sells.

documents.title: Document Seva Kendra
documents.sub: Step-by-step guides for every government document — help is free
documents.wizardTitle: What do you want to get done?
documents.helpText: Dilipsingh Bhadoriya has helped thousands of Navsari families with government paperwork — free of charge. Message him with your situation.

corporator.title: Corporator's Desk
corporator.sub: Navsari–Vijalpore Municipality · Your voice in the ward
corporator.raiseSub: Streetlight, drainage, road, water, garbage — report it here, track it publicly.
corporator.boardSub: Every complaint, its status, in the open. That is accountability.
corporator.officeText: Jai Shaktinagar Society, Near Shivaji Chowk, Ramnagar, Vijalpore, Navsari. Every day 6–8 pm.

about.title: The Story of Dilipsingh Bhadoriya
about.sub: From one small office in Vijalpore to the trust of a whole town

timeline.title: The first desk
timeline.text: Started as a property advisor in Vijalpore with one belief — never let a customer regret trusting you.

timeline.title: The LIC agency
timeline.text: Became an LIC agent so families he served could also be protected, not just housed.

timeline.title: The free seva
timeline.text: What began as helping neighbours with forms became a daily free service — thousands of documents since.

timeline.title: Elected corporator
timeline.text: The neighbourhood he served for years sent him to the Navsari–Vijalpore Municipality as their voice.

timeline.title: Still at the same desk
timeline.text: Same office, same phone number, same promise: your work is my responsibility.

values.title: Honesty over commission
values.text: A deal that is wrong for you is wrong for him — he will tell you so.

values.title: Seva without a fee
values.text: Government paperwork help has never cost a rupee.

values.title: Available, always
values.text: Corporator, agent or neighbour — the door at Shivaji Chowk is open.
